predicates.name: is_surviving_spouse_of
predicates.description: The first person is the surviving spouse of the second (deceased) person.

predicates.name: deceased_leaves_ascending_or_close_collateral_relatives
predicates.description: The deceased person leaves relatives in the ascending line or close collateral relatives.

predicates.name: is_common_property_share_of
predicates.description: The asset is the share of the deceased spouse in the common property.

predicates.name: is_exclusively_undivided_co_ownership_property_of
predicates.description: The asset is property held exclusively in undivided co-ownership between the spouses, belonging to the deceased.

predicates.name: is_own_property_of
predicates.description: The asset is own (personal) property of the deceased spouse.

predicates.name: is_subject_to_legal_return_4_24
predicates.description: The asset is subject to the right of legal return referred to in article 4.24.

predicates.name: is_subject_to_legal_return_4_25
predicates.description: The asset is subject to the right of legal return referred to in article 4.25.

predicates.name: deed_of_donation_excludes_usufruct_4_24
predicates.description: The deed of donation provides that the surviving spouse does not acquire usufruct of the asset subject to article 4.24 legal return.

predicates.name: testament_excludes_usufruct_4_24
predicates.description: The testament provides that the surviving spouse does not acquire usufruct of the asset subject to article 4.24 legal return.

predicates.name: deed_of_donation_excludes_usufruct_4_25
predicates.description: The deed of donation provides that the surviving spouse does not acquire usufruct of the asset subject to article 4.25 legal return.

predicates.name: testament_excludes_usufruct_4_25
predicates.description: The testament provides that the surviving spouse does not acquire usufruct of the asset subject to article 4.25 legal return.

predicates.name: usufruct_of_4_24_excluded
predicates.description: Usufruct of the article 4.24 legal return asset is excluded by deed of donation or testament.

predicates.name: usufruct_of_4_25_excluded
predicates.description: Usufruct of the article 4.25 legal return asset is excluded by deed of donation or testament.

predicates.name: acquires_full_ownership_of
predicates.description: The surviving spouse acquires full ownership of the asset as a legal consequence of inheritance.

predicates.name: acquires_usufruct_of
predicates.description: The surviving spouse acquires usufruct of the asset as a legal consequence of inheritance.
